channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Mailbag: The price to lure American schools into the Pac-12, impact of the ACC’s deal with ESPN, the MW’s grant of rights and more
item.description: Developments this week could impact Pac-12 expansion, but big dollars are need to lure the American schools.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Back to NASCAR's roots: Bowman Gray to host 1st Cup Series race since 1971 with preseason Clash
item.description: NASCAR is back, old-school style, as 2025 opens with a return to the “Mecca of Madhouse” for Sunday night’s preseason Clash at Bowman Gray Stadium.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jason and Kylie Kelce reveal Super Bowl loyalties amid conflicting ties to Chiefs, Eagles
item.description: Jason and Kylie Kelce reveal whom they are rooting for in Super Bowl LIX between the Kansas City Chiefs and Philadelphia Eagles as the couple have ties to both teams.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Young figure skating sisters from Virginia among victims killed in DC plane crash
item.description: A family of 4 from Virginia, including two young girls known on social media as the "Ice Skating Sisters," were killed in the Washington, D.C., plane crash Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Terry Rozier declines to address investigation, says he won't have issue focusing on basketball
item.description: Terry Rozier declined to answer questions Friday about the investigations by federal prosecutors into unusual betting patterns surrounding his play in a game when he was with the Charlotte Hornets in 2023.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Angel Reese pays off mother's mortgage in surprise birthday gift
item.description: WNBA star Angel Reese surprised her mom to paying off her mortgage as a birthday gift during a recent episode of Reese's "Unapologetically Angel" podcast.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NHL salary cap over the next 3 seasons is getting its biggest increases since it started in 2005
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The NHL salary cap is going up significantly next season, with even bigger increases set for the coming years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Laid-Back Pat: As the Chiefs chase Super Bowl history, Patrick Mahomes exudes a steadying calm
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes felt as though he needed to apologize after he helped the Kansas City Chiefs beat the Buffalo Bills in the AFC championship game, punching their ticket to the Super Bowl for the third consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Padres FanFest returns to Petco Park: what to know before you go
item.description: It's that time of year again: Padres FanFest is back and is expected to be bigger than ever, according to a spokesperson with the San Diego Padres.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Hall of Famer Dwyane Wade reveals 2023 kidney surgery to remove tumor later found to be cancerous
item.description: Hall of Fame player Dwyane Wade said doctors performed a December 2023 surgery on his kidney to remove a tumor later determined to be cancerous. “Thank God that I did do the surgery,” Wade said on his “The Why With Dwyane Wade” podcast episode released Thursday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Super Bowl I: The Kansas City Chiefs lost the first-ever game to the Green Bay Packers
item.description: Super Bowl I featured the Green Bay Packers and the Kansas City Chiefs. The Packers, led by head coach Vince Lombardi, won the game by a score of 35-10.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brotherly love; UCSD's basketball brother-duo team up
item.description: Out at UC San Diego, the Tritons have been riding a wave of success this season as they currently sit at 17-4 with their eyes set on taking the Big West. A team fueled by relationships that go deeper than you may even know, UCSD guard Chris Howell and Assistant Coach Mikey Howell teaming up.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Emotions pour from tight-knit skating community following DC plane crash carrying athletes, coaches
item.description: The tight-knit figure skating community was rocked Wednesday when an American Airlines flight carrying athletes, parents and coaches from a development camp in Wichita, Kansas, collided with an Army helicopter and crashed into the Potomac River.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: World champion Russian skaters on American Airlines jet built a new life as coaches in the US
item.description: TALLINN, Estonia (AP) — The two Russian figure skating coaches killed in the American Airlines crash were two-time Olympians and former world champions in the pairs event. They were also a married couple with a son who finished fourth last week at the U.S. national championships in Wichita, Kansas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Florida coach Todd Golden cleared in Title IX investigation regarding stalking allegations
item.description: The University of Florida has cleared men's basketball coach Todd Golden following a four-month Title IX investigation into allegations of sexual exploitation, sexual harassment and stalking.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah HC ends road trip with 3-1 loss at Ottawa
item.description: OTTAWA (ABC4 Sports) - Leevi Merilainen made 34 saves, and the Ottawa Senators won 3-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Canadian Tire Centre on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch. This time, Jalen Hurts and the Philadelphia Eagles have Saquon Barkley. The Eagles and Chiefs will face off for the Lombardi Trophy for the second time in three years on Feb.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: UVU wins 10th straight game, beating Seattle 70-66
item.description: SEATTLE (ABC4 Sports) - There is no slowing down the Utah Valley men's basketball team right now. Carter Welling scored a career-high 24 points, and Dominick Nelson added 16 as Utah Valley earned a hard-fought 70-66 road win over Seattle U on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 25-year-old San Diego native pursuing pro golf dreams at Farmers Invitational
item.description: The Farmer's Insurance Invitational, presented by the Advocates Professional Golf Association (APGA) Tour, is taking place on the North Course at Torrey Pines, showcasing the next generation of professional golfers and supporting minority players who dream of joining the PGA Tour.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: Harris English holds off Sam Stevens by a shot in the Farmers Insurance Open at Torrey Pines
item.description: Harris English held off hard-charging Sam Stevens to win the Farmers Insurance Open by one shot, securing his fifth career PGA Tour victory with a 1-over 73 in challenging weather.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Student stampede injures several ahead of AU vs. Tennessee basketball game
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (WRBL) – A chaotic scene unfolded Saturday morning outside Neville Arena as Auburn University students rushed to secure spots for the highly anticipated basketball game between #1 Auburn and #6 Tennessee.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth White, NewsNation

item.title: Australian Open: Keys upsets 2-time champion Sabalenka in women's final for 1st Grand Slam title
item.description: When Madison Keys stepped into Rod Laver Arena at 7:37 p.m. on Saturday night ahead of the Australian Open final, she strode right past the Daphne Akhurst Memorial Cup, the trophy that goes to the women's champion and was placed on a pedestal near the entrance to the court.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 49ers bring back Robert Saleh as defensive coordinator
item.description: (KRON) -- The San Francisco 49ers will fill their vacant defensive coordinator position with a familiar face. Robert Saleh will return to lead the team's defense after a tenure as the New York Jets' head coach, the 49ers announced Friday. Saleh was the 49ers' defensive coordinator from 2017-2020.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4
